review_text: Booked a budget cabin by mistake, the lovely lady in reception upgraded to a better cabin (paid the difference), she took the time to explain the area to us, wonderful service and a very comfortable cabin
It was great, the location near the board walk.

Empathy - None!
Will I ever book at Eden Gateway Holiday Park again - NO!
Will I let other people know - Yes!
Due to unforeseen circumstances, that were not in our control, an attempt to receive a reimbursement for our booking made via Booking.com was denied by the Resident Managers. The communication from and with Booking.com with all our other reservations for this trip were respectful and empathetic. Not so with Eden Gateway Holiday Park Resident Managers - a simple "non-refundable booking" was all we got. Word of mouth goes a long way.
Great Park, Great Manager’s
Recessed just off the  Hwy, plenty of green spaces, quiet. Cabins have everything you need, Dogs also permitted .
Just OK, nothing to write home about. We stayed for 6 nights over Easter and it was not busy. We also found the groundsman not very friendly at all.
Fun holiday Park with nice facilities, play area, and short walk to the water.

We went with our 2 dogs and felt so welcomed by the lady at reception.
The park was extremely well maintained and just a lovely atmosphere to be around.
Only stayed 1 night but enjoyed large open grassy spaces. Good vibes here, as Close to Asling Beach.  Also Mary McKillop museum. So LOTS to see close by this nice park.

Stayed 9 nights over NYE as part of a group of 6 sites, travelling 6 hours. Each site cost over $900 for powered site.

The booking process over the phone with Alannah was great, but check-in was very different. Alannah was flustered and unhelpful. Our “largest” site was unusable due to a large tree with exposed roots in the middle, we couldn’t properly set up our caravan or swap sites with our mates with a 4-6 person tent. When we raised this with management (management being Alannah) we were met with rudeness, no apology, and told to just share sites within our group.

Security is advertised, but it’s just management attending in dressing gowns at night — very unprofessional.

Laundry dryers are cheap $2 for 20 minutes, but 20 minutes doesn’t dry anything expect to pay 2–3 cycles. Amenities near our site felt unsafe and unclean (cloth shower curtains and constantly wet toilet floors).

Water was cut off at 10am during our stay with no proper notice we were bluntly told to “check our emails.” WiFi didn’t work and mobile service was very unreliable.

The only positive was two couples staying on the sites next to us who were absolutely amazing. They travel park to park doing maintenance and were working onsite during our stay. They helped us come up with suggestions to position our caravan differently so we could make it work. If it wasn’t for them (one named Wayne), we probably would have packed up and gone home.

For the price paid, this was extremely disappointing. Would not return.
Powered sites are relatively level and large enough. Pleasant staff, facilities are old but well maintained
Stayed 2 nights in February - excellent & highly recommended

Nice park...
Donations
Green grass.
Toilets
Off grid... 72 hours max
Would go back.... recommended
位置非常好，管理員很友善
Nice quite park
Good campsites and very friendly and welcoming staff.

No hot water for us after 7:30pm. Amenities old and not clean (shower full of hairs). Constant high-pitched noise preventing us from resting. For 80dollars a night I find it totally overpriced and not worth it.
Very big campground with not enough amenities.

The park was very clean and tidy. Plenty of room to park the caravan. Service was amazing and really nice people. Nothing was ever a bother. |What I loved best was families being families and children running, riding their bikes and even playing a bit of footy. It’s what Christmas is all about

Managers were fantastic. Amenities are very clean. The caravan sites are a good size, with grass. The jumping pillow and pool and games room kept the pre/teens happy when not adventuring.  Walkway to beach very close. Only complaint is not much shade/trees, a few very large rocks in the way of turning a large van around.
They really need to improve the hygiene situation

It has been disappointing to stay in this holiday park. All the facilities are very old and dusty, even broken. For example, the rooms and beds are dusty, the coffee machine didn’t work, even the coffee machine next door didn’t work either( we were trying to ask our neighbour next door if we could use their coffee machine, but even theirs were broken), when we asked the reception to fix up the coffee machine, we were told we should ask the cleaners, not reception. Most taps were dripping, most of the plates, cups and cooking equipments were dirty with stain and dusty. The cook tops were broken and not clean. There is no dish wash machine at all. We have tried best to clean everything without any clean tools( neither dust pan nor broom) before checking out as what we usually do in all the places we stayed, but we were shocked to be told on the way back that we are charged extra $100 for not cleaning the room properly, this is first time we experienced this issue as we used the same standard to clean the room in all other places we stayed. The holiday park didn’t send us any photos of evidences that the room is not cleaned properly,  just simply called us to say they have charged extra $100.  We don’t know what the standard we need to clean the room as we have tried our best to clean, however, I don’t think we need to clean the room as professional cleaners, which the extra $100 charge seems a scam. Overall, it has been a very bad experience to stay in Eden holiday park, where we don’t recommend it as a good place to stay.
Very nice place for vacation, restaurants, pub, beach are nearby.

Had a wonderful 3days relaxing and winding downafter a few long days travelling. The Park was very quiet and peaceful. Great pool and good location. The managers were fabulous and gave us heaps of local information on arrival. Eden is a beautiful place with some beautiful walks and interesting history.
Nice cabins and good location.

Great place.
Friendly  welcoming  staff,  clean  new  cabin with  comfortable beds.
Walk  across the road to the  board walk and  beach. Or into  town  about 1km.
No complaints about  anything.
Very friendly staff
Throughly enjoyed our stay at the park office staff were excellent facilities were very well maintained and clean, large sites with easy access with plenty to see around Eden will come again
Great location

Despote being on one of the busiest hwy's, it was still rather quiet. I would definitley come and stay here again.
Not gar from town either and a great walk to the beach.

Beautiful and lovely park! Very clean facilities and lovely and helpful staff! Big spaces for parking motorhomes and caravans. It was a pleaure to stay there and would be happy to come back. Recommend to stay there. Nice area to explore. You might see kangoroos :)
Love the facilities and the managers are super friendly
I would’ve rathered of slept on the jumping pillow then on the beds in the room i was in.
Very clean and cosy! Well managed and easy process.
Fantastic park , great cabins and large caravan sites

Friendly check in,the staff were very accommodating as I needed change my booking due to unforeseen circumstances |The unit I stayed in was great, very clean,light and bright |The grounds of the park were very spacious and well kept |Will definitely stay again
Travelling austraila, this has been one of our favourite spots. Welcoming and friendly with great amentities.

Came up with my partner and some friends for a weekend. We stayed in one of the 2 bedroom cabins which was spacious, very clean and fully equipped with everything we needed. It's a lovely park, great for kids and close to shops and activities around the area. The staff were extremely friendly and very helpful during our stay. We had an awesome time and would highly recommend.
Spent a week here and our cabin was very clean and comfortable and the team were extremely friendly. Definitely recommend

The villa we stayed in was dated and filthy . The fridge wasn’t cleaned properly , there was hair on the bathroom floor, and the shower was mouldy. The window ledges in one of the rooms was covered in black dirt. The curtain right next to the bunk bed , literally centimetres from my kids’ faces,  was visibly dusty . There were marks on the sheets and pillows . So glad we were only staying one night as my daughter had a hard time sleeping thinking how dirty the room was . Kitchen was very basic and some of the dishes and crockery in the cupboards were sticky.
Location was fine.
I’m sure there are much better options out there , or else do yourself a favour and keep driving to another town.

Lovely park with fantastic sites and ensuites. Large sites that cater for large vans..a pleasant change! Facilities clean and well maintained. Staff extremely helpful and gave wonderful overview of things to do in the area.

Allana and Les were so lovely. They are so knowledgeable about the area and helped us out with our little car issue. Thank you so much. The cabin was perfect for our family and little fur baby. It was basic but tidy (we’ve had more basic pet cabins) We will stay again.

Great Customer service from the front desk staff, clean, well appointed rooms.
Thank you!!
Caravan Park with ensuite excellent condition and mid to late week quiet also great weather
Very nice quaint holiday park by the ocean!
Good

A lovely and spacious cabin, in a very good location close to the lake, beach and the main Eden shopping strip. Easy access north to Merimbula and Bega as well being just off the highway.
Facilities and amenities in the cabin were outstanding, and the lady on the front desk was very friendly and helpful with her outstanding local knowledge.
I would definitely stay here again in future.

We stayed at Eden gateway holiday park for 10nights. Would highly recommend this park. Staff were very friendly upon checkin. Our cabin was well maintained and of good standard. Comfortable beds. Loved watching kangaroos around the park at sunset. It was a very peaceful park to stay at. Got to see the most amazing sunrises from our deck. In close proximity of the town. Internet was slow so I used my own hotspot.The staff gave me great recommendations for dinner and things to see and do.

Was going to book this place on booking.com but called to ask a few questions about room layouts. They price matched to what was on the booking.com website.
We stopped here overnight was only a quick stop over on our way home to Melbourne from NSW.
We checked in late and left early. Great after hours key box and owners were so friendly and helpfull both before our check in and after.
Great jumping pillow and playground for the children( Miss 11 loved the pillow)
We stayed in a cosy snug cabin near the playground and couldnt fault a thing.
Huge space for our family of 4. 2 adults, 11 yr old and 9 month old who is in a portacot.
Rooms were clean & had tvs in each room which was great.
Bathroom & kitchen facilities were clean.
Only fault was the overnight noise from the highway but thats expected close to the highway.
We stayed in one of the cabins it was lovely very clean and has everything you need

Eden's a wonderful place, and this park was a great location to enjoy it from. The sites are massive so you don't feel boxed in. Camp kitchen and toilets are a bit dated up still clean. Kids wise, it's a little on the decline, and for some reason, this park has a massive jumping pillow. Park is dog friendly.
The beautiful holiday park!  Very nice cabin with the kitchen. A fashion shower and very clean towels. Good location. Simple check in and check out. The reasonable prices.
Great spot that's pet friendly. Well kept with good facilities for camping. Cabins are really good with nice decks
Great location.  Nice cabins.  Reasonable prices.  Friendly and helpful management.
Well run park in a great position next to the lake and with easy access to the beach. Staff were very helpful and friendly

A beautiful place to stay. The staff were very lovely and friendly and helped us greatly during our stay. They suggested the best local child-friendly restaurants and activities. The cabins were clean, comfortable and honely. The park had activities for the kids and the amenities were clean.
Very peaceful location clean amenities friendly staff would stay again if in the area
Lovely town. Amenities were clean. Camp kitchen was awesome and very clean. Even had a lounge and TV to watch. Reception very helpful

The villas were not clean, the mattresses on the bunk beds had stains and bugs on them. The towels provided also had stains (brown spots). The dishes provided did not look like they were cleaned after their last use. The couches and dining chairs also had stains on them and were dirty.

When using the bbq facilities we were told to be quiet and keep the noise down well before the quiet time of 10pm, then when everyone went back to the villas and were hanging out on the deck (like many others in the park), having just general conversations the owner/receptionist came around and asked us "to go inside and keep the noise down" (10:30pm on a weekend, seriously?!).

The day before checkout the owner also went around to each cabin we booked and reminded us that we had to leave the rooms clean and tidy as if when we got to them it was a 5 star resort and we were a circus coming to stay and mess everything up. We all probably left the place cleaner than when we checked in and it was very condescending comments that were being said.

Would not recommend this place if you would like to go down with friends/family for a relaxing weekend to spend time and have conversations as it seems the owners and permanent residents like it to be quiet from 6pm and dont want people to enjoy their holiday park or bring them in revenue! They should change this to be marketed for seniors who go to bed at 7pm and dont talk past that time.

Seriously disappointing experience and would never stay here again or recommend to anyone! Many other nicer places around and closer to the beach that we will be staying at next time.

This park is located in walking distance to all main attractions in the area (lake-walk, beach, rock pool and centre (shops/restaurants). The staff provides maps and hints how to get everywhere. Our budget cabin was perfect for a 2 nights stay - offered all kitchen equipment. A shower and toilet inside made independent from the public version, that also was clean. Parking is possible directly at the cabin. WiFi is not reliable here and even mobile/cell coverage is not at its best.
Good place for a retreat or getaway to relax
Great park, we had an ensuite site. Very clean amenities, walk to town.

The cabin we stayed in was spacious and clean. The beds were very comfortable. While we didn't travel with any, it seemed like it would be a great place for kids - there was a pool and a number of play areas. It was close to a lovely boardwalk and we even saw some kangaroos grazing in the park! The staff were all wonderful and happy to have a good chat. They gave some great advice on what to see in town and places to eat.

Drove 4.5hrs for this, absolutely worth it with the great welcoming from the staff check in. Great mapping and easy to find where I was meant to be. Perfect upgrade on the cabins as well! I'll be sure to be booking more time here.
Can't wait to have a swim and even let the kids have a play on playground.

A lovely 2 night stay and enjoyed our stop over in Eden - a lovely small place away from the busyness. The cabin we booked was a  spacious 2 bedroom cabin with a large kitchen and lounge area. Even our bedroom had a walk in robe which gave us space to unpack and put things away properly, and room had  high ceiling with a fan. It made the room feel really big. We were provided  everything we needed for a comfortable short stay and the cabin  was very clean and tidy.  Thank you for your kind welcome and hope to come back one day in the future

Our experience at Eden Gateway Holiday Park was unpleasant due to theft. The timing of our brief stay coincided with my 9-year-old daughter’s birthday. As a part of her celebration, my wife and 5-year-old daughter had prepared a hand-made and decorated birthday cake the night before, while I took my 9-year-old fishing. That evening my wife had placed the finished cake in a box and then a bag, with the date and our surname attached to the bag. She then transferred the cake to the communal kitchen fridge overnight in preparation for my daughter's birthday the following morning. The fridge was clean and empty.

Unfortunately, the next morning upon arriving in the kitchen, I found that the cake had been taken, with the bag torn apart. I called the management of the park soon after and the lady I spoke to was empathetic and offered to purchase a replacement cake in addition to any assistance required, if that would improve matters. In the meantime, my wife went back to the kitchen to recover the bag and tidy up some of the additional items used to make the cake. She left them in the fridge as we were in a rush to head out for the day. According to management, there was no video surveillance available of the communal kitchen, so no way to know who had stolen the birthday cake. Unfortunately, that evening, the additional items were opened and eaten despite what had happened that morning, which shows me that the issue had not been addressed.

Although my daughter was disappointed, she made me proud by not letting this unfortunate incident get in the way of her having a great time on her birthday. This made me even more upset to think about it, because she’s such a kind-hearted and positive kid.

Ultimately, I understand this is not going to be the first or the last incident of theft in a caravan park and it could have been anyone, local or not, but unfortunately, I will find it difficult to forget and not associate this with Eden or the caravan park. If deciding to stay here, I would suggest locking up your belongings tight, because it appears that some individuals don’t have a problem with ruining a child’s birthday, let alone stealing food.
Excellent location, really friendly staff, decent amenities, wasn't too loud or over crowded mid January on our visit to ride at Gravity Eden.

We had an incredible stay at Eden Gateway Holiday Park! The location is perfect, nestled on the beautiful Sapphire Coast and just a short drive from Eden Town Centre. The park offers a range of amenities that cater to all holiday goers, including an outdoor swimming pool, children's playground, and communal BBQ facilities.

A special shoutout to Alana, the owner, who went above and beyond to make us feel welcome and looked after. Her warm hospitality truly made our stay memorable.

Other guests have also praised the park for its excellent service, valuable pricing, and the abundance of native birds that add to the serene atmosphere. The park's proximity to Aslings Beach and the Eden Killer Whale Museum makes it an ideal spot for both relaxation and exploration.

Highly recommend Eden Gateway Holiday Park for a fantastic holiday experience!

Just finished staying here 2 nights.  The hosts are lovely and so helpful, they gave us recommendations for places to see, places to eat! Check in and check out was a breeze.
The cabin was clean, comfy and well stocked.  We had a doggy with us and he was allowed in (not on any furniture of course).  We had no issues during our stay - toilets were clean, showers good , stocked shampoo and soap - no complaints!   The TV was really small - so don't rely on that if that is your source of entertainment.
The facilities inside were great - pool from morning to night! They had these go -kart bicycle things you could rent out - my kids loved it!  It rained pretty heavy when we were there, didn't stop us from doing these!.
The location is good - right on the highway , opposite the lake walk, a min drive from Coles.  We would certainly come back again.
Internet wasn't great ; I just used my phones hot spot - wasn't too much of an issue.
This is a great park to stay in nice big sites, plenty of things for the kids to do. Not far from the town center.

We stopped into Eden Gateway Holiday Park on a road trip to QLD. The service was wonderful and location is great (kangaroos at your doorstep and lake nearby) and the pet friendly cabin (we had our dog travelling with us) was simple enough for what we needed for a night, and value for money.

Great holiday park! It’s clean and tidy, the staff are very friendly. A walk across the road and you’re at the lake, the perfect spot to watch NYE fireworks from.
Only negative was a group of constant noisy kids who had water bottles in their bikes to make an awful loud sound. And another group under 12 kids on the playground after 11pm yelling and swearing at each other. We will request to be away from The playground next time and find a much quieter spot in the park.
Would visit again!

We were on our way to Batemans Bay, so we stopped in Eden and chose this holiday park as our stay, I can say it was pretty good, except a few things. Firstly, there were lots of insects swarming our cabin light, the pool had lots of dirty bits and bobs in it (swimming wouldn't be the best here), cabin has a bit too much dust (have no idea how) and TV at times would take a bit too long to load a single video.

I can say though, the staff were very friendly and gave us info about the entire town, which we found very useful, their go-karts, or pedal-karts were very cheap $5 for 1/2 hour and they let you borrow their table tennis equipment for free, and it was very pleasant within the park.
Cheap accommodation however was still clean and comfortable. Clean room and bed. Toilet and bathroom fans were loud and rattling. Does have a full kitchen.
We stayed on a powered site, It's a great place to stay.
Great place
Very friendly and helpful staff,Great size cabin very well appointed with everything you need,comfortable bed & not to mention the couches.

The rooms were clean, comfortable, and well set up. The best part of our time there was the kind and thoughtful service. Very quiet area and surrounded by bushland that provided opportunities for wild life sightings. We will certainly visit again.
Top park for camp site size friendly staff. Helpful.

I couldn't be happier with the Eden Gateway Holiday Park.  From the friendly service from Allana and Les at Reception, to the comfort of the cabin.    It is a great place to relax with all the amenities available after a day exploring the Sapphire Coast.
I had the Snug Cove 4 which is spacious.
The park is close to town and there is The Rusty Plough within walking distance for some delicious takeaway.
I'll definitely be rebooking for 2025.
A great value park with lovely staff!

The only thing better than than the hospitality and exceptional customer service from Managers Allana and Les, was the high standard of cleanliness in both our cabin and the Park facilities. Our Cabin was spotlessly clean, very spacious and provided everything we needed, in a truly beautiful and peaceful location. The kangaroos and birds just added to the charm. Our stay was brief, however we will definitely be back for an extended stay. Cannot recommend this park highly enough !!👍👍👍

We all had an awesome stay at the Eden Gateway Caravan Park.  Allana and Les were extremely helpful..|Very clean and tidy cabins,  we had all we needed, and thankyou Les, our blindwas fixed within 2 hrs of us advising the office. great service..|Thank you for an very pleasant stay, and the weather and whale watching was incredible..|Definitely a bucket list item for anyone’s list….  Sue D 🌻🌻

We stayed for for 4 nights in the snug cove spa villa. The staff at the park are exceptionally great they treated us like family couldn’t do enough for us. Very close to everything to do in Eden. Seeing the Whales was a great experience for our family.

Really like this place. Good size camping sites. Lots of grass and shade and reasonably priced. Even when the place is full it still seems to be roomy. Only down side is traffic noise on Princes Highway.
Came back in Oct 24. No hot water. Told management, they said the issue is the gas and they will fix. Next day no hot water.

All I can say its not good with the new management. We have 2years old babyand we booked for 2nights they asked extra $30 because it’s only under 6months they get free accommodation. We told them we co-sleep iur baby but they wont listen.

Avoid this EDEN GATEWAY if you want to stay for holiday in Eden

Very well kept and relaxed park. Managers were very friendly and helpful. Quiet area just out of town with great walks around the lake. |The park is clearly going through a transition stage and everything is very positive. Quite close to town and all that has to offer. We will be going back

I so wanted to love this place. But how dilapidated our cabin was!!!!

I wanted to sweep/mop the floor on arrival, because is was so dirty, but on searching the cabin all I could find was a broom and a flat broom/mop thing. Not a dustpan to pick up the mess that was all around us. And after moving a couch in order to see the TV, we found these empty bottles that had been left for who knows how long between rooms cleans.
A lot of things were bad in this cabin. The hot water tap in the kitchen was loose and kept falling off. The cold water tap in the bathroom didn’t work at all. The front door would not lock or open properly and was at breaking point.
On the positive side.
The couple who were there managing the park, while we were there, were really lovely and helpful. As was the owner at reception.
The location is great.
A gorgeous walk to the sea through a reserve with much wildlife.
Nice and quiet while we were there, Beginning August 2024.

Lovely spacious cabins, meticulously maintained with modern amenities including a washing machine inside the villa. Lynn was incredibly accommodating. Although we initially planned a brief stay while traveling, we're very likely to return. Perfect for families with its excellent location. Highly recommended!
Stayed 1 night in our 7.4m motorhome and had a nice quiet powered site towards the rear of the park. Good facilities and staff were really nice. It's not on the water but it's only a short walk away.

Peter & Lyn, the relief managers were wonderful. Fairly large park with plenty of room in off-season and facilities adequate, although a little dated. Permanents are at the top end, so we were not really aware of them. We had a very pleasant stay, but I imagine it gets a little rowdy in the peak season.
Good stop over for a few nights. Drains well after a rain.  Showers are a touch small. Good clean facilities.
Great park, friendly managers, amenities very clean

Beautiful caravan Park. Clean amenities.
Staff were exceptionalilly friendly and helpful. Close to shopping, beautiful beach and situated right near the most terrific mountain bike circuit park.
Thanks Eden. Coming back next year.🌸💞🌸
Recently stayed here nice grass dog friendly site reception staff were very friendly and helpful with local attractions. Manager very nice and helpful amenities clean very nice bbq area
Huge camp-site. Great facilities. New management doing fantastic job only one week on the job at extremely busy time. Fantastic communal campfire and movie nights for the kids.

A great caravan park. We stayed in a tent. Lots to do for the kids... movie nights were fab! Managers Kat & Gareth go above and beyond to make the stay happy. Clean facilities & very nicely kept park.

Great 3 nights had here over Easter. Camp Managers were very helpful. Nice large grassy powered pitches with clean amenities and a dump point. Close to Eden town centre, 2 min drive. Courtesy bus from the social club too was very handy. Bell Miner birds echo through the park but thankfully they get thier heads down at night.

Nice quiet place, lovely staff.
Convenient location.
Great park. Pity about the Bellbirds that never stop as it puts you off of a return. Other than that cannot fault the place. Eden is a beautiful place to stay.
Great location.  Great amenities.
Our cabin is very clean and comfortable. Would recommend to any person looking to stay in Eden.
Nice and Affordable
Pleasant green quiet place to stay while exploring the south coast area.

We stayed for a week in a rooftop on a unpowered site.
The park is pretty, we are surrounded by birds and kangaroos.
The place is very quiet and relaxing.
The amenities (toilets, showers, bbq area, covered kitchen with: oven, gas stove, microwave...) are clean (a little outdated but very functional and hot water for showers).
The staff is absolutely adorable, available and accommodating! A big thank you to the blonde lady at the reception (whose name I unfortunately do not have) who was very accommodating and attentive to us!
The campsite is also very well located.
Great service! Beautiful location! Nice size cabins! Friendly staff! Big ups to everyone thank you ☺️

Very overpriced room, $275 per night for one bedroom regardless if it is peak season is ridiculous.

500mb WiFi is hilarious in this day and age you may as well not even not offer it as complimentary service. Even if it didn't work anyway which just added to the comedic value.

Front gate a bit glitchy multiple people had issues with the code not working correctly.

On a plus the Lady at reception was very pleasant and the room was clean. .
Clean well equipped cabins with all the necessary amenities. Staff was kind and helpful. Easy self check in after hrs.

Booked via Expedia explicitly informed that 4 people were coming, yet I still had to pay extra since on their booking it said only 2 people, even though we paid extra we couldn’t even get the second car in because we weren’t allowed, they promised free wifi which didn’t work and was capped at 500 mb per day, how ever the guy Zeb that does room service was an actual gun he recovered my cigars and was very friendly. It’s very expensive 4 nights we paid 1700, it’s not worth the money

We stayed here for 4 nights. Carbin is clean and tidy. The whole place is good overall. However we don't understand why only one car is allowed to get in within the park. They stated that there is not enough room but that's not the case. The carbin we lived has plenty of place for two cars. Also the park has a stupid password protected gate and ONLY one car can go through because the system doesn't allow for a second car to used the same code. We have to park outside the park and ask the staff to open the gate when we load/unload our stuff. When asked, staff always told us 'You have a car in the park already' and we have to explain we need to load things up.

Overall this experience is pretty bad and if you have more than one car and want to book a single carbin please avoid this place

Awesome park weather was a bit ordinary but still had a great time, we found ourselves in a bit of a pickle and Brad one of the helpful staff members was fabulous couldn’t thank him enough.
Would love to return during whale season after visiting the killer whale museum

Very poor shower. Only one, the curtain is completely see through plus its like one meter away from the urinal. Very unhygienic.
Not worth 70$.
Excellent service and valuable price.,Highly recommend

Booked for 5 days on a powered site. Stayed 7. New management are keen to update the facilities, but everything is clean and functional as it is. Just a bit tired. Great pool!! Would easily recommend.
very friendly  nice basic room  n

We stayed here in October 2023 for 10 days and loved every moment.
The birds sing to you from dawn to dusk, there is wildlife including Kangaroos, a peacock, we saw a goanna and the trees and flowers are lovely.
It is walking distance to the lake across the road with a very long board walk, the shops  the beach, the golf club so it is a great location.
So many things to do and see in and around the area and would stay here again for sure.
We had a powered ensuite site which was roomy and easy to park the van and the ensuite was lovely.
The park itself has wonderful well maintained facilities, pool, laundry, and the park looks beautiful and the Managers were excellent always willing to help.
Would recommend to anyone and everyone.
Amazing quiet camp grounds with heaps of nature, lovely staff in a great location.

The reception lady was very nice and explained clearly. We had a broken key and the response was very quick and in good humor. The cabin was as dry as website and clean and comfortableWe had a happy stay there.
Great quiet park
Great park, spotless amenities
We were a big group and they accommodated us efficiently. Would recommend it.
Very nice clean park with ensure sites.
Lovely caravan Park, we enjoyed our stay thankyou.

We booked a cabin for 4 people for one night and were really impressed with the accommodation.  It was clean, big and had everything you could possibly need. We only spoke to the staff over the phone. They were very friendly and helpful. It is a great place to stay. We will certainly stay there again.
Loved Edan, will definitely be back, great site had on-suite site  great facilities,  friendly staff
Own van clean friendly park short drive to town   walking distance .On highway but no traffic noise .

We stayed on an en-suite site for the night in our roof top tent. This was our first stop on the way to the great ocean road. Clean bathroom, hot shower. Management was very friendly and accommodating. All other campers were friendly and quiet. A good stop over, thanks!

Me and my son went up to Eden about 2 months ago like I have for around 35 years. I stayed in this park with my family for about 20 years when it was the Fountain caravan park. Everything was going really good until going to the front desk to PAY for 3 weeks accommodation. We where met by a very rude THING that asked us if we where homeless. I had $4000 in my NEW nissan navara and camp trailer and didn't look homeless. WILL NEVER STAY THERE AGAIN.
NEVER STAY AT THIS PLACE.
Great park large powered sites close to shops and beach

Un très beau camping,  la cabine était parfaite, spacieuse . Bien pour cuisiner
Le matin kangourous sur la pelouse
We're caravaning. Very happy with the ensuite site. Wetlands walk not far away. Boardwalk around the lake. Beach within walking distance from the caravan park.
Lovely welcome was received, lovely location with the bellbirds in the surrounding trees and lovely accommodation.

Made a booking through Agoda many months ago which was confirmed. When my family & I arrived, I was rudely advised that they didn’t have a record of my booking and even told that Eden Gateway Holiday Park haven’t dealt with Agoda for over 3 years. However when you go to search for accommodation in Eden on Agoda, Eden Gateway Holiday Park is the first option. Regardless, the woman at the desk told me they were fully booked (middle of winter, I think not, most of these parks are very quiet) and was not willing to help me at all, leaving me and my family stranded in a strange town. Thankfully, another holiday park in the area were more than accommodating. Agoda were good enough to refund.
A week on a powered site. 🥰 Thanks Peter and Lyn so helpful and friendly. Peaceful,  immaculate don't drive past. Is that Ship still in the Bay? ⛴️ 🐳
Have been coming here for 20 yrs.  Always peaceful. Great location. Hosts Lynn & Pete are amazing.
Lovely spot. Friendly and helpful owners. Close to the beach, a short stroll along the board walk. Grassy sites and clean and tidy amenities. We will be back in summer! Thank you
Pet friendly, everything works; clean and tidy.  Bell birds in the morning a real treat.
An amazing park central to the town. Close to all the tourist destinations. Very clean amenities and  a highlight was having the kangaroos roaming around the park.
Fantastic place to stay and excellent pricing 😁
Stayed in a lovely cabin. Was upgraded at no charged. The park has heaps of things for the kids to do

We stayed 2 nights (powered site) and was warmly welcomed by Lynn and Peter (caretaker). Love the nature feel (birds chipping). Amenities were clean and well taken care. Roos droppings were observed on grass area. Be careful on where you rest your foot on.
Very clean and comfortable cabin. Great location, not too close to town. Will recommend.
A basic caravan that was clean and tidy. Good location with the river and beach at your doorstep. The ensuite was quite old and are in need of an update.
Powered site was excellent, close to all amenities and services in Eden plus some lovely local bird life.
